LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS DOUGLAS ROBERTS, MITCHELL ROBERTS, MATTHEW ROBERTS AND DANIEL ROBERTS' MOTION FOR AN AWARD OF ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS TO DEFENDANTS AS PREVAILING PARTIES AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT THEREON IS CONTINUED TO MAY 23, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302 TO PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN 4PM MAY 16 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE. IF THE COURTESY COPIES ARE NOT RECEIVED BY THAT DATE, THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED IN FULL. THE COURT HAS RECEIVED COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS DOUGLAS ROBERTS, MITCHELL ROBERTS, MATTHEW ROBERTS AND DANIEL ROBERTS' MOTION FOR AN AWARD OF ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS TO DEFENDANTS AS PREVAILING PARTIES AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT THEREON. ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS MODIFIED: GRANTED IN LARGE. DEFENDANTS ARE AWARDED FEES OF $16,362.50 AND COSTS OF $4,510 FOR A TOTAL OF $20,872.50. THE FEES REQUEST FOR THIS MOTION IS REDUCED BY $2000 SINCE THE MOTION IS SIMPLE AND REQUIRED LITTLE OR NO RESEARCH. ALL OTHER FEES AND COSTS WERE REASONABLY INCURRED AND DEFENDANTS ARE ENTITLED TO RECOVER THEM AS PREVAILING PARTIES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Award Of Attoenys Fees And Costs To Defts As Prevailing Parties And For Entry Of Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar May-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Paul J. Dion, Esq., from Jones Bothwell Dion & Thompson LLP, for defendants and moving party
Leslie V. Freeman, Esq., from Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld, 510-337-1001, for Plaintiff and opposing party

Argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling as modified.
DEFENDANTS DOUGLAS ROBERTS, MITCHELL ROBERTS, MATTHEW ROBERTS AND DANIEL ROBERTS'Motion For An Award Of Attoenys Fees And Costs To Defts As Prevailing Parties And For Entry Of Judgment Thereon is Granted in large. Defendants are awarded fees of $16,362.50 and costs of $4,510 for a total of $20,872.50. The fees request for this motion is reduced by $2000 since the motion is simple and required little or no research. All other fees and costs were reasonably incurred and defendants are entitled to recover them as prevailing parties. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Award Of Attoenys Fees And Costs To Defts As Prevailing Parties And For Entry Of Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Continued To May-23-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS DOUGLAS ROBERTS, MITCHELL ROBERTS, MATTHEW ROBERTS and DANIEL ROBERTS' Motion For An Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs To Defendants As Prevailing Parties And For Entry Of Judgment Thereon is Continued to May 23, 2012 to provide plaintiff with the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of its opposition papers to department 302 no later than 4pm May 16 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. If the courtesy copies are not received by that date, the motion will be granted in full. The court has received courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
